description: COSO 2013 Internal Control — Integrated Framework as executable metadata: control assessments flow in as records, effectiveness scores accumulate per COSO component, material weaknesses and significant deficiencies are logged and routed to the auditor, and a maturity KPI framework tracks the five components against target.
name: COSO Internal Control Framework

entities.description: One tested control: which COSO component it belongs to, how effective it operated, and any deficiency classification.

events.description: A control deficiency was identified — a material weakness, a significant deficiency, or an effectiveness rating below tolerance.

rules.name: Record control effectiveness
rules.description: Scoring-only rule: every assessment lands in the score fabric per control and per COSO component before any deficiency decision.

rules.name: Log material weaknesses
rules.description: A material weakness means a reasonable possibility of material misstatement — always logged and routed, never averaged away.
rules.reasonTemplate: Material weakness in control {controlId} ({cosoComponent}): effectiveness {effectivenessRating}. Requires remediation plan and audit committee visibility.

rules.name: Log significant deficiencies
rules.description: Less severe than a material weakness but important enough to merit governance attention.
rules.reasonTemplate: Significant deficiency in control {controlId} ({cosoComponent}): effectiveness {effectivenessRating}. Remediation owner to be assigned.

rules.name: Log low-effectiveness controls
rules.description: Even without a formal severity classification, a control operating below 0.6 effectiveness is a deficiency.
rules.reasonTemplate: Control {controlId} ({cosoComponent}) operated at {effectivenessRating} effectiveness — below the 0.6 tolerance; deficiency logged.

rules.name: Accept effective controls
rules.description: Controls operating at or above tolerance close their assessment cycle cleanly.
rules.reasonTemplate: Control {controlId} ({cosoComponent}) operating effectively at {effectivenessRating}; no deficiency.

capabilities.name: Internal Control Assessment
capabilities.description: COSO-based control testing cycle: assess, score, log deficiencies, remediate.

performanceFrameworks.name: COSO Component Maturity v1
performanceFrameworks.description: Tracks control effectiveness per COSO component (Control Environment, Risk Assessment, Control Activities, Information & Communication, Monitoring) against the 0.8 maturity target.

okrs.objective: All five COSO components operating at maturity

workflows.name: Deficiency remediation routing
workflows.description: Every logged deficiency notifies the auditor and opens a remediation task for compliance.
